calibration_scope: Public framework-provisional default. Licensed runtime calibration is resolved by profile, sector, geography, and active manifests; verify through /v1/calibration-health.
deployment_provider_revision: Recorded in release evidence after deployment; not self-embedded because a provider revision is created by the deployment itself.
note: Registry/package/documentation revisions may change without changing the protected Worker/API runtime.
current_openapi_contract: v1 contract family aligned to v6.32.0 runtime

archived_lines.api_v1_materials: historical DOI/indexing continuity; not recommended for new integrations
